details.IncidentDetail: "[3] [Appended, 21:26:34] [2] RP ADV CLOSURE/DETOUR SIGNS FOR CLOSURE LEAD BACK TO THE SB BLAINE ONR WHICH IS ALSO CLOSED"
"[1] RIVERSIDE IC - SB 215 TO SB 215 CON IS CLOSED"
"[3] 123-CZP1 4TH ONR 10 W CLOSURE CLEARED/ NOW TAKING FT EB 10 F 6TH TO HAVEN"
"[1] RT LN OF ON CLOSED -- LEFT WILL STAY OPEN FOR NOW "
"[1] 86-CZP3 2 RIGHT LNS SHUT DOWN FM JWO TUST TO THE 55 TIL 0500"
"[1] 55-CZP1 EB 91 BH TO LEMON, RT 2 LANES * ONRS/OFRS OPEN, EXCEPT EUC ONR CLOSED"
